The '''Liberation of Harte Secur''' was a retaliatory battle where forces led by [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] attacked [[Camp Six]] and the occupied [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Harte Secur]] to rescue their [[Fambaa/Legends|Fambaa]] beasts of burden. The Gungans destroyed a Federation command there, and getting their attention, drew them out to the [[Great Grass Plains/Legends|Great Grass Plains]], thus liberating the city.

==Behind the scenes==
The Liberation of Harte Secur appears during the Gungan campaign in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. The campaign was also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
